name: Beet Salad with Orange and Tarragon
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp finely snipped fresh tarragon or 2 teaspoons dried tarragon
Salt and freshly milled black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the leaves off the beets, but do not remove the tops or pierce the beets themselves.
2. Fill a saucepan with enough water to cover the beets generously and bring to a rapid boil.
3. Add the beets and reduce the heat so that the beets boil gently until tender, 20 to 30 minutes.
4. When you can easily pierce them with a sharp knife, thin skewer, or cake tester, they are done.
5. Drain the beets in cold water to cool them and handle safely.
6. Drain again and cut off the tops and slip off the skins.
7. Cut into 1/4-inch thick slices and place in a salad bowl.
8. Pour over the dressing and toss well.
9. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve. The beets can also be left to marinate at room temperature for several hours.
